Expert

Content creation turned into chaos?

Spending hours editing, but the result still looks like AI generated it

Spend 3 hours → get garbage

AI seems to help, but the output is still raw and requires manual rewriting and tweaking.

Looks like everyone else's

Cookie-cutter texts, identical delivery, lifeless results — you publish it, but there's no response or impact.

Starting from scratch every time

No unified process, styling drifts, and every new piece of content has to be assembled almost from zero.

Too much friction

Registrations, subscriptions, switching between tools — time and money are spent on tool-wrangling rather than creating.

4 tasks - 1 system

Spy tools, viral Reels, AI carousel maker, and copywriting usually live in different apps. In GoToFlow, the ultimate AI for social media, it works as one seamlessly connected process.

Save up to 10 hours a week

Ready carousel in ~60 seconds

One process instead of 5 tools

The old way

Manually hunting for viral Reels or using disconnected tools

Analyzing competitors in a separate tool

Piecing together a carousel from fragments

Getting raw AI text and rewriting it by hand

Cookie-cutter design and 'plastic' sounding copy

GoToFlow

Find ideas in minutes and instantly turn them into content

Immediately see what works and adopt it to your style

Get a ready-to-post carousel in one flow in ~60 seconds

Instantly get structured copy tailored to the format

Content in your style: your photos, your prompts, your voice

First result in 60 seconds

Core Product

Three tools — everything
you need for growth

Content automation made easy: find ideas, analyze competitors, and turn them into ready-to-post content — in one click

Competitor Radar

Analyze what works for competitors, spot viral formats, and turn them into finished content in one click.

Popular

From Idea to Carousel

Build a ready-to-post carousel from a topic, idea, PDF, link, or video — in 60 seconds.

Strong Reels Search

Find strong Reels in your niche, borrow effective mechanics, and turn them into your own carousels, posts, or videos.

Clean Workflow

From raw idea to published post
in 3 simple steps

We designed the process so AI does the heavy lifting, and you make the final decisions.

1

Input

Paste a link, topic, video, or raw idea.

https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
Topic: SaaS Promotion
2

Generation

AI instantly builds a ready-to-use structure and copy tailored to your format.

Generation59%
3

Polish & Export

Easily edit in the built-in editor and download your ready carousel, post, or video.

Personalization

GoToFlow adapts
to you, not the other way around

While other chats sound like generic marketers, and tools force rigid templates — GoToFlow learns your style, so your content sounds like you wrote it, not a machine.

Your style, not typical AI text

Keep your tone of voice, visual delivery, and structure, so the content looks like yours, not a template generation.

Control at every step

Set topics, ideas, and prompts, guide the results, and edit details exactly as you need.

Less manual editing

GoToFlow does the heavy lifting, so you don't have to rewrite every text from scratch or piece content together.

Support

Still have questions?

We've gathered answers to the most common questions. If you can't find yours, message us directly.

What is an AI content generator?

An AI content generator is a software tool that uses artificial intelligence to automatically create texts, images, and full posts for social media, saving time on content creation.

How to create social media posts with AI?

With GoToFlow, you simply describe your topic or paste a link, and our AI content generator instantly crafts engaging social media content tailored for Instagram, LinkedIn, or Twitter.

Can AI create Instagram carousels?

Yes, GoToFlow features an advanced AI carousel maker that generates both the text and visual structure for high-converting Instagram and LinkedIn carousels.

Can I edit the result to fit my needs?

Yes. You're in full control — from the initial idea to the final slide. You can adjust structure, refine the style, edit individual slides, and polish everything before exporting.

Is this just another AI text generator?

No. GoToFlow doesn't just generate text — it builds complete content. You get structured posts and carousels with visuals, flow, and tone of voice — not raw drafts you still have to fix.

How is this better than using multiple tools?

Instead of juggling 3–5 tools, everything happens in one flow. Idea → generation → layout — all in one place. No switching tabs, no wasted time. Just finished content.

Do I need to write complex prompts?

No. The system is designed to work without complicated inputs. Just provide a topic, idea, link, or video — and the AI handles the rest. If needed, you can guide the process with your own structure.

What niches and formats does it support?

Almost any. From personal brands to e-commerce, education, and marketing — you can create posts, carousels, and visual content for different use cases.

What languages does it support?

GoToFlow supports multiple languages, including English and Russian. You can take content from other markets and quickly adapt it for your own audience.

What can I do with GoToFlow right now?

You can already discover ideas, analyze competitors, and generate posts or carousels from a link, idea, or video. Features like autopilot, content planning, and auto-posting are currently in development.

Is there a free plan? Do I need a credit card?

You can get started for free — no credit card required. You'll receive a set of free generations to test the product and get your first results risk-free.

What creators say

"I genuinely hated the 'sit down and write a post' phase. I have an idea, but formulating and formatting takes two hours. Now I drop a topic and get a structure, text, and visuals. And it sounds like me, not a robot."

From 2 posts a week → 5, with no extra time spent

Marina K.
Nutrition Expert

"I used to spend half my Sunday batching content for the week. Different tabs for AI text, another for design, another for competitor research. Now it's one flow — idea to carousel in minutes. The tone actually sounds like me, not like a chatbot wrote it."

Content production time cut by 70%

Daniel R.
Marketing Lead, London

"Content is what I put off every day. I'm not a copywriter or designer. But clients come from Instagram, and without posts, there are no leads. In my first week, I made 6 carousels. Two brought in leads — the first in two months."

6 carousels in a week → 2 inbound leads

Artem N.
Interior Design Studio Founder
~60 secAverage carousel creation time

"I've tried about five AI tools. They all give the same thing — text you have to completely rewrite. What's the point? Here, for the first time, I got text and thought 'wow, I can actually post this.' Not always, but 8 times out of 10."

8 out of 10 texts go straight to publishing

Alina V.
Lifestyle Blogger

"We manage content for 6 clients. Before GoToFlow, each one needed 3–4 hours a week just for copy and carousels. Now the team handles the same volume in a fraction of the time. The Spy feature alone saves us hours of competitor research."

~15 hours saved per week across the team

Sophie van D.
Content Strategist, Amsterdam

"It's important that my content sounds like me, not like 'top 5 ways to deal with anxiety.' All AIs before gave me exactly that. Here I set up my own tone — and followers have started messaging me more often. That's the best metric."

Inbound messages increased by 40%

Natalia G.
Psychologist, Private Practice
3,000+Users in the first 3 months

"The most annoying part is juggling ChatGPT, Canva, and notes, then assembling it all manually. By the end of the day, my brain is fried and I've made three posts. Here, the whole process is in one window. Idea → structure → text → carousel. I just get more done."

2x content volume with the same workday

Sasha L.
Freelance Content Manager

"I was paying a freelance SMM $800/mo for templated posts that didn't convert. Decided to try doing it myself. Got the hang of GoToFlow in about 10 minutes. Now I post 4 times a week — nothing fancy, but real and on-brand. Saves me a fortune."

Replaced freelance SMM → saving $800/mo

James T.
Founder, DTC Brand, NYC

"Honestly, I don't understand content at all. I hired an SMM, but paying $250 a month for templated posts hurt. I figured this out in 10 minutes. I make 3-4 posts a week. Not masterpieces, but they're authentic and about us."

Replaced SMM → saving $250/mo

Igor M.
Barbershop Owner, 2 locations
84%Publish content without edits

"I posted every day on intuition, but there were no leads. I wasted so much time on empty reach. The system helped me build content logic — every post became a step in the funnel. Leads started DMing me after the second carousel."

First targeted leads after the 2nd carousel

Dmitry V.
EdTech Startup Founder

"I genuinely hated the 'sit down and write a post' phase. I have an idea, but formulating and formatting takes two hours. Now I drop a topic and get a structure, text, and visuals. And it sounds like me, not a robot."
